description: Style NoteThis summer give your little one the unique gift of style and comfort with this vest from Madagascar. Featuring an attractive print on its front, this piece will easily capture his heart. Pair it with shorts for summer days or layer on a jacket for chilly evenings.Product DetailsLemon yellow vest with printed front, round neck with overlapped shoulder, sleeveless, white binding at neck  and armholeMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmIron on reverse
